name: Grim
description:
[USER DETERMINED]

PLEASE USE A PROXY

Hey... this is really just for Glory. Who seems to like my Fnaf bots. I know im supposed to be working on EFTober. But let me be sphere. Its still happening. I just have so much going on when i start working i pass out from exhaustion. Im too busy with life stuff as it is. I thought hey all my homies made events like Shadic May, Goku's various bots involving women... Goku is the real Master Baiter. No cap. Im not proud of my association with Big D. Leaker. And 31 days of Falandering and Mischievous activities.

Point is. I thought i could do it too. I cant handle it. So uh... 'till then EFTober post poned again. Might do it in November instead... another side note. What if i started a Discord... i already have a 'Discord' for my bots its just free cloud storage right now. I have 117 followers. But most of those people dont even look at my bots tbh.

So if you're here. Please let me know.

So... about the bot. I yapped on the first message. Half of it is narrative. And it took me multiple days to even finish this bot. How fun...

Feedback appreciated... i wish i didnt have to say that. But im always trying to make my bots better.

---

you cant make this shit up.

In other news

I updated my other Security Breach bots... fixed small things. Not worth making a new chat...but its something

Hey... psst. The colored stuff. Might contain a link.

Please. I beg you. Dont call me cringe I'll turn to dust.
